targets.rawSql: SELECT wifi_rssi AS "dBm" FROM diagnostics ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(heap_bytes::numeric, 0) AS "KB" FROM diagnostics ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT uptime_s FROM diagnostics ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT temp_case AS "°F" FROM climate WHERE temp_case IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Reboots" FROM v_reboot_log
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT reset_reason FROM diagnostics WHERE reset_reason IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), 'none') AS reset_reason
SELECT $__time(ts), ROUND(heap_bytes::numeric, 0) AS "Heap (KB)" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), wifi_rssi AS "RSSI (dBm)" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_case AS "Case Temp (°F)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_case IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), uptime_s / 3600.0 AS "Uptime (hrs)" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(hour), transitions AS "Transitions/hr" FROM v_state_transition_rate WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) ORDER BY hour
SELECT value AS "State", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY value ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT $__time(hour), parameter AS "metric", oscillations AS "value" FROM v_setpoint_velocity WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) AND oscillations > 0 ORDER BY hour

panels.description: Shows the sequence of controller states over the last 24 hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "State" FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: State Timeline (24h)

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(temp_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 14 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     temp_f::float AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

WITH timeline AS (
    SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes') AS ts
)
SELECT t.ts AS time,
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).temp_low::float AS "Band Low",
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).temp_high::float AS "Band High"
FROM timeline t ORDER BY t.ts

SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar W/m²" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM climate WHERE solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
    date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, solar_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM weather_forecast WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 82 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 84 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 2" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 86 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 58 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 56 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 2 (gas)" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Temperature vs Target Band

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit over time, one of the most important plant-stress signals in the greenhouse.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(vpd_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time,
     (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     vpd_kpa::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

WITH timeline AS (
    SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes') AS ts
)
SELECT t.ts AS time,
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).vpd_low::float AS "Band Low",
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).vpd_high::float AS "Band High"
FROM timeline t ORDER BY t.ts

SELECT ts AS time,
    (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.8 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister South" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.9 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister West" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.0 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister Center" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.1 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: VPD vs Target Band

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), enthalpy_delta AS "ΔH (kJ/kg)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND enthalpy_delta IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'Open' ELSE 'Closed' END AS "Vent" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'vent' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'Blocked' ELSE 'Available' END AS "Economiser" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'economiser_blocked' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Tracks whether the planner is producing plans and whether plan quality is improving or degrading over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, avg(outcome_score::numeric) AS "Plan Score" FROM plan_journal WHERE created_at > now() - interval '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, count(*)::double precision AS "Plans Logged" FROM plan_journal WHERE created_at > now() - interval '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Plan Score Trend & Planning Volume

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, avg_error AS "Forecast bias (°F)" FROM fn_forecast_correction('temp_f', 24)

panels.title: Forecast Bias (temp)

panels.description: Shows planning behavior, compliance, or planning outcomes over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT plan_id, to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'MM/DD HH:MI') AS "Created", COALESCE(outcome_score::text, '-') AS "Score", COALESCE(LEFT(hypothesis, 60), '-') AS "Hypothesis" FROM plan_journal ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Last 10 Plans

panels.description: Shows hourly write activity alongside oscillation counts.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(hour), SUM(writes) AS "Writes" FROM v_setpoint_velocity WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
SELECT $__time(hour), SUM(oscillations) AS "Oscillations" FROM v_setpoint_velocity WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

panels.title: Write Rate + Oscillations
